# resend-listener

A background process that captures incoming emails and writes them as .eml files to an inbox directory.

## Using email in tests

When testing flows that send email (registration, password reset, invites, etc.):

1. Read `<inbox>/filter.txt` to learn the active filter pattern (e.g. `myapp-tyler*@somedomain.com`). Use an email address matching this pattern when filling out forms or calling APIs.
2. Perform the action that triggers the email.
3. Poll the inbox directory for new .eml files. Emails typically arrive within a few seconds.
4. Read the .eml file to extract links, codes, or tokens needed to continue the flow.
5. Delete the .eml file after processing so it doesn't interfere with subsequent checks.
